concerns.text: Missing task for Plan Phase 0 (Governance & Constitution Amendment). The plan explicitly requires Task 0.1 (draft amendment), Task 0.2 (update constitution.md), and Task 0.3 (update state files) as a strict prerequisite. The tasks.md assumes the amendment is done ('Note: Constitution Principle VI has been amended') but provides no task to execute this legal change, blocking the implementation of FR-002.

Missing task coverage for Spec FR-001 image resolution. FR-001 mandates '256x256 pixels'. Task T013 implements '128x128 pixels' based on plan constraints. While the plan justifies this, the tasks.md lacks a specific task to formally document this deviation or update the spec's acceptance criteria to reflect the 128x128 resolution, creating a gap between the spec requirement and the implemented task.

Missing task coverage for Spec FR-007/SC-004 statistical method. FR-007 and SC-004 explicitly mandate 'paired t-tests'. Task T027 implements 'One-way ANOVA and Tukey HSD'. The tasks.md lacks a task to formally justify this methodological change or update the spec requirements to match the plan's decision, leaving the spec requirement unmet by the current task set.

Missing task coverage for Spec SC-001 success metric verification. SC-001 requires verifying 'MAE ≤ 5%'. Task T016 only validates 'Voigt-Reuss-Hill bounds' (physical plausibility). There is no task to explicitly compute and report the MAE against the 5% threshold on the test set as required by the success criterion.

Missing task coverage for Spec SC-005 stability reporting. SC-005 requires measuring 'variance in performance metrics across folds'. Task T022 only mentions 'Integrate k-fold cross-validation logic'. There is no explicit task to calculate and report the variance/standard deviation of R-squared values across folds.

Missing task coverage for Spec SC-002 degradation rate definition. SC-002 requires quantifying 'degradation rate' for OOD densities. Task T029a calculates the slope but does not explicitly include a task to define and report the 'max_training_density' threshold used to determine OOD, which is necessary to satisfy the spec's intent.
